title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 2
display_title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 2
wikitext:
[]: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 2. Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:21 pm The middle 8 minutes and 51 seconds of episode 1 of Neon Genesis Evangelion. 1. How is his father a "tough customer?" 2. What is a geo-front? 3. If she doesn't want to wear a skirt in that place, then why is she? 4. ew... Ritsuko's eyebrows... are large... and dark... *hides away* 5. Third Child??? Who are the First and Second Child(s??? (ren??)) 6. Neither Shinji or his dad are lovable according to Mitsuko... how is that so??? 7. Hahaha, I like how she says, "0.0000000000001 **or whatever the number was*" and uses reireireireireireireireirei... but when she says, "It's not zero!" she uses "zero". ;p nice. 8. DADDY!!! well... he's remembering bad memories... 9. DUDE!! BITCH!!! FUCKING ASSHOLE!!!!!!!!! Shinji's dad SUCKS FUCKING ASSHAIR!!! : ((( Poor Shinji! 10. oh :( He wants to run away...

[]: Post by chee » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:27 pm #9: You haven't seen the worst of it...oh wait, you have.

[]: Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:30 pm sorry if i'm coming off as a killjoy, but I doubt these thoughts of yours on each episode each require their own thread.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:30 pm keep it in one topic

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 2. Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:43 pm birdyofthemoongoddess wrote: 1. How is his father a "tough customer?"

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:47 pm hooray for kudos!!! also... uh... I'll start putting them in by episode... after the third part of ep. 1.... heh hehe.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:50 pm Can someone join these threads?

[]: Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:51 pm I can see you're sympathizing for Shinji, this is good because in order to enjoy Eva to its fullest you need to sympathize for him and understand his depression. And trust me when I say he goes through some messed up things throughout the series keep it in one topic

[]: Post by Sachi » Mon Nov 05, 2007 11:40 pm ITS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED THAT YOU WATCH THE WHOLE SERIES BEFORE YOU START ASKING QUESTIONS

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Tue Nov 06, 2007 12:16 am Sachiel_13 wrote: ITS HIGHLY RECOMMENDED THAT YOU WATCH THE WHOLE SERIES BEFORE YOU START ASKING QUESTIONS
